page_metadata.biotools__summary: Lantern is an integrative repository of functional annotations for lncRNAs in the human genome. It is a genome-scale lncRNA ontology annotation extractor and cellular network repository.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Lantern is an integrative repository of functional annotations for lncRNAs in the human genome. It is a genome-scale lncRNA ontology annotation extractor and cellular network repository.
